ai_summary: Enviro Infra Engineers Limited (EIEL) has secured a significant domestic contract valued at ₹126.78 Crores (excluding GST) for the development of a 45 MLD Sewage Treatment Plant in Uttar Pradesh under the Namami Gange Programme. This Hybrid Annuity Model (HAM) project, executed through an SPV, involves an 18-month construction phase followed by a substantial 15-year operation and maintenance period, materially boosting the company's order book and ensuring long-term revenue visibility. No related party transactions or other red flags were identified in the document.
